selected_topic: NASA's Webb detects methane and strange chemistry on interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS
news_angle: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope detected methane and unusual chemistry on the interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS, marking the first direct methane discovery on such an object, reported 2 hours ago.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a young, stylish streetwise space explorer cat, wearing a futuristic black hoodie and sleek space sneakers, stands confidently on a floating icy comet shaped like a giant glowing orange tabby paw. Around him, vibrant nebulas and stars twirl in the background, while tiny methane molecule caricatures with party hats orbit playfully around the comet's paw-fingers. Nearby, a quirky alien DJ on a vinyl spinning station shaped like a Webb telescope beam projects colorful waves labeled with chemical formulas. In the foreground, mischievous little comet fragments shaped like mini cats chase methane bubbles, symbolizing the strange chemistry discovery. In the distance, the silhouette of the James Webb Space Telescope can be seen peeking behind a cluster of stars, wearing sunglasses and nodding to the music. The setting feels vibrant, youthful, and chaotic, like a cosmic street party celebrating the first methane catch on an interstellar guest, packed with tiny easter eggs referencing interstellar travel, methane symbols, and Webb telescope tech.

image_prompt.main_character: Hunk Mao as a compact, athletic orange tabby cat with expressive oversized eyes, mischievous confident grin, wearing a sleek black space hoodie with a subtle NASA patch and futuristic sneakers.
image_prompt.setting: floating icy comet shaped like a giant orange tabby paw in vibrant outer space nebula environment with twirling colorful stars.
image_prompt.foreground: tiny methane molecule characters wearing party hats bouncing on the comet's paw, mini cat-shaped comet fragments chasing methane bubbles.
image_prompt.midground: quirky alien DJ with a vinyl turntable shaped like James Webb telescope beam projecting colorful chemical wave patterns labeled CH4 and strange chemistry symbols.
image_prompt.background: James Webb Space Telescope silhouette with sunglasses behind star clusters dancing to cosmic music.

caption: NASA's Webb just snagged the first direct methane detection on an interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS, revealing some seriously strange chemistry out there. Guess even cosmic cats like me find these space parties strangely lit with mysterious gas bubbles!
risk_notes: No financial or investment advice; image content purely metaphorical and playful referencing scientific discovery.
